title: Sauling of Ascension
description: A wacky mod that turns minecraft into a boss and tech based progression game!
body:
![The Sauling of Ascension logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7418b1811277565747dc09aa2713ee547fe33387.png)
> _First we Saul then we Ascension!_ - please_rember_to_add_name.text
### What even is this?
Sauling of Ascension (or SOA for short) is a total conversion mod (kinda), think of it like TerraFirmaCraft meets GTNH (but 10 times as cursed and a _little bit_ scuffed)

SOA is also a compilation (and rework) of most of my (mostly unreleased) mods!
_______________________________________________________________________________________________
![A cave with some hops and a cobblestone alloy forge inside of it](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac26a99b0b9bd4616627fbe888496c0977595f82.png)
_An example of an early game base in SOA, with a cobblestone alloy forge and some hops growing_
_______________________________________________________________________________________________
### SOA completely changes some stuff like...
- Early game progression you now need to get a flint knife to cut grass, get hops seeds and create your own alloy forge!
- The Enchanting Table can be obtained earlier, now using amethyst and deepslate!
- Flint and steel now needs actual steel to be made
- The nether and the end are inaccessible, instead you go to other dimensions like the moon and the pain realm
- Sleeping now no longer skips the night!

_However,_ unlike other mods which overhaul the game and makes the early game more difficult SOA focuses more on fun and satisfying progression rather than tedious grind and annoying difficulty
_______________________________________________________________________________________________
![A nice looking house with a machine inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/35f667ed582c0401a5491d25182a6f079e3a5952.png)
_A working ore crushing system, the raw ores are inputted in the barrel, crushed by the crusher and then smelted in the blast furnace_
_______________________________________________________________________________________________
## Create wacky machines!
SOA also adds a whole tech based branch of progression, allowing you to create your own mean dream magic box machines (with some amount of automation)!
### Some machines that you may make in SOA are...
- The ~~_pulveriser_~~ crusher, used to double your ores by turning them into dust!
- The Alloy Forge, used to make alloys by combining 2 different types of ingots!
- The Cystal Growth Chamber, used to duplicate stuff like redstone
_______________________________________________________________________________________________
## Fight over 5 Bosses and Events!
SOA adds a ton of bosses and events to keep you busy
### such as...

<details>
<summary>Click to see the bosses!</summary>

Lord pork, the king of all pigs

0ba-M4 and it's creator Jerm M. Jerryson, President of the USS

Dave, The Master of Homelessness

Avatar of Agony, the final boss and goal of SOA!

and 2 events, where mobs fall from the sky and attack you!
</details>


_______________________________________________________________________________________________
## Mod Compatibility and recommendations
**Due to all of the changes that SOA does to the game not many mods are compatible with it!**

However... some may be, if a mod does not add any worldgen or any content other then QOL then it should be compatible, But I would still recommend being careful when using other content mods with SOA

**It's also recomended to play with [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) and [Just Enough Resources](https://modrinth.com/mod/just-enough-resources-jer)!**
_______________________________________________________________________________________________
